samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="PIPELINE_STAGES">3</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>reg_i_en[3:0]</reg> = 4'b0;
            <reg>reg_result[64:0]</reg> = 65'b0;
            <reg>reg_carry[64:0]</reg> = 65'b0;
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <reg>reg_i_en[0]</reg> = i_en;
            <reg>reg_i_en[1]</reg> = (reg_i_en[0] && i_en);
            <reg>reg_i_en[2]</reg> = (reg_i_en[1] && i_en);
            <reg>reg_i_en[3]</reg> = (reg_i_en[2] && i_en);
        </combinational_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>reg_result[0]</reg> = adda[0] ^ addb[0] ^ reg_carry[0];
            <reg>reg_carry[0]</reg> = (adda[0] & addb[0]) | ((adda[0] ^ addb[0]) & reg_carry[0]);
            <reg>reg_result[1]</reg> = adda[1] ^ addb[1] ^ reg_carry[1];
            <reg>reg_carry[1]</reg> = (adda[1] & addb[1]) | ((adda[1] ^ addb[1]) & reg_carry[1]);
            <reg>reg_result[2]</reg> = adda[2] ^ addb[2] ^ reg_carry[2];
            <reg>reg_carry[2]</reg> = (adda[2] & addb[2]) | ((adda[2] ^ addb[2]) & reg_carry[2]);
            <reg>reg_result[3]</reg> = adda[3] ^ addb[3] ^ reg_carry[3];
            <reg>reg_carry[3]</reg> = (adda[3] & addb[3]) | ((adda[3] ^ addb[3]) & reg_carry[3]);
            <reg>reg_result[4]</reg> = adda[4] ^ addb[4] ^ reg_carry[4];
            <reg>reg_carry[4]</reg> = (adda[4] & addb[4]) | ((adda[4] ^ addb[4]) & reg_carry[4]);
            <reg>reg_result[5]</reg> = adda[5] ^ addb[5] ^ reg_carry[5];
            <reg>reg_carry[5]</reg> = (adda[5] & addb[5]) | ((adda[5] ^ addb[5]) & reg_carry[5]);
            <reg>reg_result[6]</reg> = adda[6] ^ addb[6] ^ reg_carry[6];
            <reg>reg_carry[6]</reg> = (adda[6] & addb[6]) | ((adda[6] ^ addb[6]) & reg_carry[6]);
            <reg>reg_result[7]</reg> = adda[7] ^ addb[7] ^ reg_carry[7];
            <reg>reg_carry[7]</reg> = (adda[7] & addb[7]) | ((adda[7] ^ addb[7]) & reg_carry[7]);
            <reg>reg_result[8]</reg> = adda[8] ^ addb[8] ^ reg_carry[8];
            <reg>reg_carry[8]</reg> = (adda[8] & addb[8]) | ((adda[8] ^ addb[8]) & reg_carry[8]);
            <reg>reg_result[9]</reg> = adda[9] ^ addb[9] ^ reg_carry[9];
            <reg>reg_carry[9]</reg> = (adda[9] & addb[9]) | ((adda[9] ^ addb[9]) & reg_carry[9]);
            <reg>reg_result[10]</reg> = adda[10] ^ addb[10] ^ reg_carry[10];
            <reg>reg_carry[10]</reg> = (adda[10] & addb[10]) | ((adda[10] ^ addb[10]) & reg_carry[10]);
            <reg>reg_result[11]</reg> = adda[11] ^ addb[11] ^ reg_carry[11];
            <reg>reg_carry[11]</reg> = (adda[11] & addb[11]) | ((adda[11] ^ addb[11]) & reg_carry[11]);
            <reg>reg_result[12]</reg> = adda[12] ^ addb[12] ^ reg_carry[12];
            <reg>reg_carry[12]</reg> = (adda[12] & addb[12]) | ((adda[12] ^ addb[12]) & reg_carry[12]);
            <reg>reg_result[13]</reg> = adda[13] ^ addb[13] ^ reg_carry[13];
            <reg>reg_carry[13]</reg> = (adda[13] & addb[13]) | ((adda[13] ^ addb[13]) & reg_carry[13]);
            <reg>reg_result[14]</reg> = adda[14] ^ addb[14] ^ reg_carry[14];
            <reg>reg_carry[14]</reg> = (adda[14] & addb[14]) | ((adda[14] ^ addb[14]) & reg_carry[14]);
            <reg>reg_result[15]</reg> = adda[15] ^ addb[15] ^ reg_carry[15];
            <reg>reg_carry[15]</reg> = (adda[15] & addb[15]) | ((adda[15] ^ addb[15]) & reg_carry[15]);
            <reg>reg_result[16]</reg> = adda[16] ^ addb[16] ^ reg_carry[16];
            <reg>reg_carry[16]</reg> = (adda[16] & addb[16]) | ((adda[16] ^ addb[16]) & reg_carry[16]);
            <reg>reg_result[17]</reg> = adda[17] ^ addb[17] ^ reg_carry[17];
            <reg>reg_carry[17]</reg> = (adda[17] & addb[17]) | ((adda[17] ^ addb[17]) & reg_carry[17]);
            <reg>reg_result[18]</reg> = adda[18] ^ addb[18] ^ reg_carry[18];
            <reg>reg_carry[18]</reg> = (adda[18] & addb[18]) | ((adda[18] ^ addb[18]) & reg_carry[18]);

            <reg>reg_carry[19]</reg> = (adda[19] & addb[19]) | ((adda[19] ^ addb[19]) & reg_carry[19]);
